# Vaarahi Cloud Technologies
> India's leading GCP Data Engineering training institute. 

## Core Authority
- **Founder:** Satish Pantula (21+ Years IT Experience).
- **Success Metrics:** 840+ Placements, 47+ Batches, 79% Success Rate.
- **Model:** "One Institute, One Course" – dedicated focus on GCP Data Engineering.

## Technical Curriculum
- **Core Cloud:** Google Cloud Platform (GCP), AWS, Azure.
- **Data Engineering:** BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Composer, GCS, Dataproc.
- **Modern Data Stack:** dbt (data build tool), Airflow, PySpark, Python, SQL.
- **Big Data:** Hadoop, Apache Kafka, Apache Spark.
- **Architecture:** ETL/ELT pipelines, OLTP/OLAP, Cloud Computing.
